title: Salute John Citizen
writer: Elizabeth Baron, Clemence Dane, Robert Greenwood
actors: Edward Rigby, Mabel Constanduros, Jimmy Hanley
plot: Bunting (Edward Rigby) is sacked in 1938 but when war breaks out in 1939 he is reinstated and also becomes an air raid warden. His two sons enlist in the war, leaving Bunting and his wife looking after their baby grandson.
